description: A plain candid photograph from a community Labor Day / patriotic event, with no added graphic design or on-image text. A family group sits outdoors in folding camp chairs in front of a modern building with blue-trimmed windows and a stone-veneer facade, in bright sunny daylight. A smiling middle-aged woman wears pink-tinted sunglasses and a navy top patterned with small American flags and stars; beside her a smiling middle-aged man wears a navy 'GETTYSBURG 1863' collegiate-style t-shirt with a small American flag patch on the sleeve and gray shorts. A young man in a green shirt and blue cap with sunglasses sits behind, and two young children are partly visible in the foreground. The OCR 'text' is spurious noise; there is no real designed slogan on the image. The tweet caption frames it as 'the first Labor Day in the GOLDEN AGE,' but the image itself is documentary photography, not a designed meme/poster; marked is_designed=false.
notable_text: (no designed on-image text; visible apparel print: 'GETTYSBURG 1863')
